title: Sekyuriti shitsumon
description: Akaunto kaifuku no tame no sekyuriti shitsumon wo settei shimasu

setup.title: Sekyuriti shitsumon no settei
setup.select_questions: {{count}} ko no shitsumon wo erabi, kotae wo nyuryoku shite kudasai
setup.instruction: Anata dake ga shitte iru kotae no shitsumon wo erande kudasai. Kotae wa oomoji komoji wo kubetsu shimasen.

recovery.title: Sekyuriti shitsumon ni kotaeru
recovery.description: Akaunto wo kaifuku suru tame ni sekyuriti shitsumon ni kotaete kudasai

questions.q1: Hajimete katta petto no namae wa?
questions.q3: Kodomo no koro no adana wa?
questions.q4: Kodomo no koro no shinyu no namae wa?
questions.q5: Hajimete katta kuruma no mekaa wa?
questions.q8: Sodatta machi no toori no namae wa?
questions.q9: Kodomo no koro no sukina tabemono wa?

validation.answer_too_short: Kotae wa sukunakutomo 3 moji hitsuyou desu
validation.answer_too_generic: Motto gutaiteki na kotae wo nyuryoku shite kudasai
validation.all_answers_required: Subete no shitsumon ni kotaete kudasai
validation.incorrect_answers: Hitotsu ijou no kotae ga machigatte imasu
validation.select_different_questions: Betsu no shitsumon wo erande kudasai
